playbook.intent: Per retainer client every quarter to confirmed renewal, scope adjustment, or planned offboarding.
playbook.scope: Founder runs a 45-minute structured review with each retainer client every quarter. Output: confirmed renewal, scope adjustment, or planned offboarding. Exit artifact: per-client review pack + signed renewal / scope-change / offboarding note.

success-criteria.criterion: Retainer renewal / scope change / offboarding decision logged
Updated scope or signed offboarding note in writing

stage.name: Prep + run review
stage.decision-gate: Advance after meeting held with sponsor decision direction.

stage.name: Decide + paper
stage.intent: Renew, change scope, or offboard - in writing.
stage.decision-gate: Required: written outcome for every retainer reviewed.

extra.value: [Full QBR for project-based clients - separate playbook, New-business pitch within the meeting - never mix]
[Retainer client with 1+ quarter under contract, Health + outcome data captured monthly]
[Auto-renewing without a review - kills upsell + lets churn fester, Skipping the offboarding paper trail - clients drift back resentful, Letting the review drift into 'how is it going' chat]
['Did the client commit a next-quarter outcome?', 'Is the renewal / change paper signed?', 'If offboarding, is the wind-down plan dated?']

{human: faion get-content quarterly-retainer-review-per-client --format md, agent: faion get-content quarterly-retainer-review-per-client --format context, json: faion get-content quarterly-retainer-review-per-client --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
